$schema_note: Pre-Negotiation Gate (Gate 3) per AKB_Deal_Flow_Orchestrator_Spec §4 + 5/13 PN-07a amendment. 19 items. Runs every time a reply lands or before any negotiation move. The Briyana 5/12 acceptance is the negative case this gate exists to prevent — would have caught sqft variance (PN-07), surfaced photos for manual condition review (PN-07a), refused to validate against stale MAO (PN-12), and blocked accept at counter price (PN-14).
source: Orchestrator spec §4 Gate 3 + 5/13 PN-07a amendment (interior photo condition variance)

items.description: Pull FULL Quo thread (every msg both directions)
items.pass_criteria: Quo thread fetched (any count, including 0 — surfaces 'no SMS history' explicitly)

items.description: Pull FULL Gmail thread for any matching contact
Pull current live listing (status, price, photos)
items.pass_criteria: Live_Status fetched from listing (Phase 1 = Airtable-derived snapshot)

items.description: Compare current list price vs price at outreach (Prev_List_Price)
items.pass_criteria: list_price unchanged from prev_list_price; warn on >list_price_change_warn_pct delta

items.description: Pull updated CMA via RentCast comps
items.pass_criteria: RentCast returned >=1 comparable (raw count, before filters)

items.description: Verify Building_SqFt matches CMA median (not modeled default)
Verify condition from interior photos against modeled condition (>50% variance blocks). Phase 1: surface photo URLs + count + data_missing for vision parse.
items.pass_criteria: Phase 1 (current): if photos exist → data_missing with URLs + 'manual review required'. Phase 2 (TODO): vision-model condition parse, compare to modeled, block on >50% variance.

items.description: Verify ownership of record (named seller vs CMA)
items.pass_criteria: Phase 1: data_missing — Listings_V1 has no seller_name field. Future: pull from Deals table or RentCast property API.

items.description: Check for liens > sale price (short sale flag)
items.pass_criteria: Phase 1: data_missing — no lien data source wired. Future: title prelim or county records integration.

items.description: Classify reply: rejection / interest / counter / question / inbound_lead
items.pass_criteria: Always pass; data_examined.reply_classification surfaces the route + counter_price (if detected)

items.description: If counter detected: compute spread at countered price
items.pass_criteria: If PN-10 found counter, (Investor_MAO - counter) > 0. If no counter, pass.

items.description: Refresh Pricing Agent with verified Sqft + condition (blocks when PN-07 flagged variance)
items.pass_criteria: If PN-07 detected sqft variance, block with 'Pricing Agent must re-run with sqft=X from CMA'. Otherwise pass.

items.description: Recompute Your_MAO with refreshed inputs (downstream of PN-12)
items.pass_criteria: Passes when PN-12 passes (cascade). If PN-12 blocked, this carries the same block reason.

items.description: Compare new Your_MAO vs countered price
items.pass_criteria: If PN-10 detected counter, Your_MAO >= counter. Block if counter > Your_MAO.

items.description: Surface confidence band (HIGH/MED/LOW) for the move
items.pass_criteria: Always informational pass; data_examined.confidence_band derived from ARV_Confidence + Rehab_Confidence_Score

items.description: Detect decision spiral (3+ monotonic downward moves)
items.pass_criteria: Phase 1: data_missing — Pricing_Last_Run history isn't stored yet. Future: scan audit_log for pricing-agent:agent_run entries on this recordId, detect 3+ monotonic-down Your_MAO sequence.
Neither Quo nor Gmail thread contains an inspection_waiver_phrase

items.description: Verify response stays within pre-approved template OR routes to Alex approval queue
items.pass_criteria: Phase 1: data_missing — no template library wired. Future: template-match outbound draft against approved patterns, route nonconforming to Approval Queue.
